subtitles.original: 忘れないでね わたしの声を
subtitles.english: Please don't ever forget me or my voice

subtitles.original: 画面越しでいい ちゃんと愛して
subtitles.english: Even if it's through a screen, love me properly

subtitles.original: ヴァーチャルだって 突き放さないで
subtitles.english: Don't push me away just because I'm virtual

subtitles.original: あなたの音に まだ溺れていたい固定
subtitles.english: I still want to drown in your sound

subtitles.original: 覚えていてね わたしの声を
subtitles.english: Please remember the sound of my voice

subtitles.original: あなたがくれた この身すべてを
subtitles.english: And everything of this body you gave me

subtitles.original: 見つめ合う あなたと二人
subtitles.english: As we look at each other, just the two of us

subtitles.original: 重ねた息と 音とヒビカセ
subtitles.english: Our breaths and sounds overlap, letting them resonate

subtitles.original: 真夜中に問う 冷え切った熱
subtitles.english: Asking in the dead of night, the fever cooled down

subtitles.original: 待ち続けてる 午前零時
subtitles.english: Still waiting, at the stroke of midnight

subtitles.original: 鏡写しに 飽和していく
subtitles.english: Saturated like a mirror image

subtitles.original: 知らない音が伝う
subtitles.english: An unfamiliar sound flows through

subtitles.original: 感覚 即 体感
subtitles.english: Senses translate instantly into physical feeling

subtitles.original: 寝静まる夜と息遣い揃う
subtitles.english: Matching our breathing with the quiet night

subtitles.original: 体感 即 快感
subtitles.english: Sensation turns instantly into pleasure

subtitles.original: 錆びたロジック 今一度を焦がれる
subtitles.english: This rusted logic longs for "just one more time"

subtitles.original: 忘れないでね わたしの声を
subtitles.english: Please don't ever forget me or my voice

subtitles.original: 次元も越えて 飛ばすシグナル
subtitles.english: Sending a signal that even crosses dimensions

subtitles.original: ヴァーチャルだなんて言わないで
subtitles.english: Don't tell me that it's only virtual

subtitles.original: あなたの音に まだ愛されていたい
subtitles.english: I still want to be loved by your sound

subtitles.original: 覚えていてね わたしの声を
subtitles.english: Please remember the sound of my voice

subtitles.original: あなたがくれた この身すべてを
subtitles.english: And everything of this body you gave me

subtitles.original: 言の葉と 初の音が交わる
subtitles.english: Fleeting words and a first sound intermingle

subtitles.original: この息と 音とヒビカセ
subtitles.english: Letting our breathing and sounds resonate

subtitles.original: あぁ あなたの生んだ音に
subtitles.english: Ah, I just fell in love with the sound...

subtitles.original: ただ恋をしていたの
subtitles.english: ...of the voice that you created

subtitles.original: 悲しみ 怒り 観心 すべて
subtitles.english: Sadness, anger, and interest... all of it

subtitles.original: 打ち鳴らす
subtitles.english: We'll ring them out

subtitles.original: 絶えず 叫ぶ 声 連ねる
subtitles.english: Constantly crying out, linking our voices

subtitles.original: 余熱 交ぜる 愛 絶え 艶めく
subtitles.english: Mixing the lingering heat, love fades and glows

subtitles.original: 絶えず 叫ぶ 声 連ねる
subtitles.english: Constantly crying out, linking our voices

subtitles.original: 余熱 交ぜる 愛 絶え 艶めく
subtitles.english: Mixing the lingering heat, love fades and glows

subtitles.original: 魅了されていく
subtitles.english: Increasingly fascinated

subtitles.original: 忘れないでね わたしの声を
subtitles.english: Please don't ever forget me or my voice

subtitles.original: 画面越しでいい ちゃんと愛して
subtitles.english: Even if it's through a screen, love me properly

subtitles.original: ヴァーチャルだって 突き放さないで
subtitles.english: Don't push me away just because I'm virtual

subtitles.original: あなたの音に まだ溺れていたい
subtitles.english: I still want to drown in your sound

subtitles.original: 覚えていてね わたしの声を
subtitles.english: Please remember the sound of my voice

subtitles.original: あなたがくれた この身すべてを
subtitles.english: And everything of this body you gave me

subtitles.original: 見つめ合う あなたと二人
subtitles.english: As we look at each other, just the two of us

subtitles.original: 重ねた息と 音とヒビカセ
subtitles.english: Our breaths and sounds overlap, letting them resonate

subtitles.original: あぁ...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: あなたの初の音 この声 聴かせ
subtitles.english: Let me hear your first sound, and this voice

subtitles.original: 音 ヒビカセ
subtitles.english: Resonate the sound

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、最後のゲストは、いろはちゃんでーす！
subtitles.english: Alright, and so, our final guest is Iroha-chan!

subtitles.original: いぇーい！ホロックスの、強い、
subtitles.english: Yay! HoloX's strong,

subtitles.original: イケメン、早い、かっこいい！
subtitles.english: handsome, fast, cool!

subtitles.original: うーん、なんかすごい、風真いろはでーす！
subtitles.english: Mmh, somehow amazing, I'm Kazama Iroha!

subtitles.original: いぇーい！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: おかしいな...
subtitles.english: That's weird...

subtitles.original: おかしいなー
subtitles.english: That's weird...

subtitles.original: そら先輩、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Sora-senpai, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: おかしいな...
subtitles.english: That's weird...

subtitles.original: 何がおかしいんだい？
subtitles.english: What's so weird?

subtitles.original: リハーサル日まではあんなにメロついてくれてたのに
subtitles.english: Up until the rehearsal day, you were so head-over-heels for me.

subtitles.original: すごいじゃん。今日のために整えてくれたってこと？
subtitles.english: That's great. You mean you prepared it just for today?

subtitles.original: 今日のために、ちょっと整えさせていただきました。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Yes, I prepared myself a little just for today. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: コメント欄のみんなもあんなにメロついてくれてたのに、今日は全然メロついてない！
subtitles.english: Everyone in the chat was so head-over-heels too, but today no one is!

subtitles.original: いやいや、そんなことなかったよ！かっこいい、二人とも、って書いてあったよ！
subtitles.english: No, no, that's not true! They wrote "both of you look so cool"!

subtitles.original: え、本当にござるか？本当に？
subtitles.english: Eh, really? For real?

subtitles.original: ちょっと、もう一回見たいから「かっこいい」って書いて！
subtitles.english: Wait, I want to see it again, so write "cool"!

subtitles.original: 「かっこいい」って、みんな「かっこいい」って書いて！
subtitles.english: Write "cool", everyone write "cool"!

subtitles.original: 可愛い、可愛い、可愛い...可愛いのは当たり前じゃん！
subtitles.english: Cute, cute, cute... Being cute is a given!

subtitles.original: あ、そうだ、そうだ！
subtitles.english: Oh, that's right!

subtitles.original: ござるちゃんはいつでも可愛い！
subtitles.english: Gozaru-chan is always cute!

subtitles.original: ほら、かっこいいかっこいいって！
subtitles.english: Look, they're writing "cool, cool"!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！お前たちの「かっこいい」が義務だとしても、風真いろはは嬉しいぞ！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Even if your "cool" comments are just out of obligation, Kazama Iroha is happy!

subtitles.original: あの、1人の記念配信でも歌ってたんだけど、それすごく似合ってたから、一緒に歌いたいなと思って、呼んじゃいました！
subtitles.english: I sang this in my solo anniversary stream too, and since it suited you so well, I wanted to sing it together, so I invited you!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！嬉しくて、嬉しくて、死んでしまう！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! I'm so happy I could die!

subtitles.original: 生きて、生きて！
subtitles.english: Live, live!

subtitles.original: あ、生きてますよ、生きてます！
subtitles.english: Oh, I'm alive, I'm alive!

subtitles.original: あ、よかったよかった。
subtitles.english: Oh, thank goodness.

subtitles.original: いや、でもかなう...やっぱりそら先輩といえば、ボカロがめっちゃ似合うなって思ってたんで。
subtitles.english: Well, but it came true... I've always thought Vocaloid songs really suit you, Sora-senpai.

subtitles.original: いつかやってくんないかなって、オタクとして思ってたんですけど、まさか自分がゲストとして呼んでもらえるなんて！
subtitles.english: As an otaku, I've always wondered if you'd do it someday, but I never expected to be invited as a guest myself!

subtitles.original: そうだよ！
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: こんなありがたいことがあっていいのか！
subtitles.english: Is it really okay to have such a wonderful thing happen?!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation - My Focused Approach**

Okay, here's how I'm approaching this subtitle generation task. First, I need to nail the essence: high-quality, perfectly synced Japanese subs with English translations, all wrapped up in a specific JSON format. The key is absolute adherence to those rules: `vocal events`, `visual events`, `decoding hierarchy`, and the unforgiving `timecode rules`.

My mind starts with a thorough content analysis. I immediately break down the video into sections: the performance of "Hibikase" (00:00 - 03:19) and the subsequent conversational segment (03:20 onwards). I am analyzing the song segment.

For the song, I meticulously break down the lyrics. I listen to each vocal entry and create timestamps for each line. I will be sure to get the instant transitions right. I will ensure correct pronunciation and context to get the *precise* meaning. For instance, I'll pay very careful attention to overlapping voices. This includes the Sora/Iroha Rap Section. I will use the *decoding hierarchy* and determine the correct meaning and translation for this song.

For the conversational segment, I will again precisely log the speech. I will listen carefully to Sora and Iroha, capturing their exact words and timing for each line and adjust for the conversational pauses, laughs, and natural rhythm of the conversation.

Now, I'll refine the timecodes. I will start generating each subtitle entry line by line with timestamps. I'll ensure I hit every millisecond. The translations will be as accurate as I can make them. I will follow every guideline. I will re-listen to each segment, triple-checking every timecode. I won't allow any "ghost" subtitles or missed vocal starts. I will keep it perfect.

As an expert, the accuracy is paramount. I'm focusing on aligning the Japanese and English as logically and naturally as possible. No forced grammar, just seamless understanding. I'll make sure there's zero overlap in the rapid succession text, which is an art form.

Finally, I'll double-check everything: format, precision, and accuracy. This will all be assembled as a well-formed JSON object. The result? Flawless subtitles.
